params_used.custom_text: // This module performs a barrel shift operation on a 4-bit input A using a 2-bit control signal B. When B=00, the output Y is the same as A. When B=01, Y is the result of shifting A to the right by one position. When B=10, Y is the result of shifting A to the left by one position. When B=11, Y is the result of shifting A to the right by two positions.
